package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_toupper_equalfold: `strings.ToUpper(...) == strings.ToUpper(...)` instead of `strings.EqualFold(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario672Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.EqualFold(left, right)
}
